requirement_topic.en: Kahramaa Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), LVRT (IEC TS 62910), and 50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: Kahramaa并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、LVRT（IEC TS 62910）及50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: Kahramaa併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、LVRT（IEC TS 62910）及50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V參數

summary.en: Kahramaa's Technical Specifications for the Connection of Solar PV Systems to the Network (EP-EPP-P7-S1) sets out the grid-connection technical requirements for PV inverters in Qatar. Key requirements include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within 2 seconds maximum; (2) IEC TS 62910 Low Voltage Ride-Through (LVRT) test procedure compliance; (3) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission limits; (4) EN 50530 overall efficiency test evidence; (5) EN 50524 data sheet and nameplate compliance. Qatar's grid operates at 50 Hz ±0.1 Hz, single-phase 240 V ±6%, three-phase 415 V ±6% (Kahramaa Wiring Code 2018). Inverter firmware and protection relay settings must be validated against these Qatar grid parameters, not the 50 Hz 230/400 V settings used in China.
summary.zh: Kahramaa《太阳能光伏系统接入电网技术规格》（EP-EPP-P7-S1）规定了卡塔尔光伏逆变器并网技术要求，主要包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试——逆变器须在最长2秒内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC TS 62910低电压穿越（LVRT）测试程序合规；（3）IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放限值；（4）EN 50530综合效率测试证据；（5）EN 50524数据表和铭牌合规。卡塔尔电网运行参数为50 Hz ±0.1 Hz、单相240 V ±6%、三相415 V ±6%（Kahramaa布线规范2018）。逆变器固件和保护继电器整定须针对上述卡塔尔电网参数进行验证，而非中国使用的50 Hz 230/400 V参数。
summary.zht: Kahramaa《太陽能光伏系統接入電網技術規格》（EP-EPP-P7-S1）規定了卡達光伏逆變器併網技術要求，主要包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試——逆變器須在最長2秒內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC TS 62910低電壓穿越（LVRT）測試程序合規；（3）IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放限值；（4）EN 50530綜合效率測試證據；（5）EN 50524數據表和銘牌合規。卡達電網運行參數為50 Hz ±0.1 Hz、單相240 V ±6%、三相415 V ±6%（Kahramaa布線規範2018）。逆變器韌體和保護繼電器整定須針對上述卡達電網參數進行驗證，而非中國使用的50 Hz 230/400 V參數。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (explicitly cited in Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1)
IEC TS 62910 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure for low-voltage ride-through measurements (explicitly cited in Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (explicitly cited in Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1)
EN 50530 — Overall efficiency of grid-connected photovoltaic inverters (explicitly cited in Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1)
EN 50524 — Data sheet and nameplate for photovoltaic inverters (explicitly cited in Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1)
Kahramaa Wiring Code 2018 — Qatar grid parameters: 50 Hz, 240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2012 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and are not accepted as Kahramaa grid-connection evidence. The key parameter difference is voltage: China's grid standard is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, whereas Qatar Kahramaa specifies 240/415 V at 50 Hz. Firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions must be re-parameterised and retested for Qatar Kahramaa grid conditions.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2012（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国电网条件，不被Kahramaa接受为并网证据。主要参数差异在于电压：中国电网标准为220/380 V 50 Hz，而卡塔尔Kahramaa规定为240/415 V 50 Hz。针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护阈值须重新针对卡塔尔Kahramaa电网条件设置参数并重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2012（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國電網條件，不被Kahramaa接受為併網證據。主要參數差異在於電壓：中國電網標準為220/380 V 50 Hz，而卡達Kahramaa規定為240/415 V 50 Hz。針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護閾值須重新針對卡達Kahramaa電網條件設置參數並重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2012 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1 requirements. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC TS 62910 LVRT test evidence; (c) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission compliance evidence; (d) EN 50530 efficiency test data; (e) EN 50524-compliant data sheet. Additionally, firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays must be validated for Qatar's 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters. Where inverter firmware settings differ from the factory default for China, re-parameterisation should be documented and, if the change is material, re-tested under the applicable IEC standard.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC TS 62910 LVRT测试证据；（c）IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放合规证据；（d）EN 50530效率测试数据；（e）符合EN 50524的数据表。此外，固件保护阈值和重连延迟须针对卡塔尔240/415 V、50 Hz电网进行验证，而非中国220/380 V电网参数。若逆变器固件设置与中国出厂默认设置不同，须记录重新参数化过程，如变更重要，应依据适用IEC标准重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC TS 62910 LVRT測試證據；（c）IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放合規證據；（d）EN 50530效率測試數據；（e）符合EN 50524的數據表。此外，韌體保護閾值和重連延遲須針對卡達240/415 V、50 Hz電網進行驗證，而非中國220/380 V電網參數。若逆變器韌體設置與中國出廠預設設置不同，須記錄重新參數化過程，如變更重要，應依據適用IEC標準重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1 where that specification applies; anti-islanding, LVRT, and harmonic compliance are non-negotiable gates in project-level Kahramaa review
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Kahramaa Qatar grid-connection acceptance

source.publisher: Kahramaa (Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kahramaa's grid-connection specification requires IEC 62116, IEC TS 62910, IEC 61000-3-2, EN 50530, and EN 50524 evidence — none of which is covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Qatar's 240/415 V at 50 Hz grid before testing and document the configuration. Verify the current edition of Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1 and any supplementary connection conditions directly with Kahramaa before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] Kahramaa并网规格要求IEC 62116、IEC TS 62910、IEC 61000-3-2、EN 50530和EN 50524证据——上述均未被中国GB/T并网证书覆盖。测试前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为卡塔尔240/415 V 50 Hz电网参数，并记录配置。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向Kahramaa核实Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的现行版本及任何补充接入条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] Kahramaa併網規格要求IEC 62116、IEC TS 62910、IEC 61000-3-2、EN 50530和EN 50524證據——上述均未被中國GB/T併網證書覆蓋。測試前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為卡達240/415 V 50 Hz電網參數，並記錄配置。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向Kahramaa核實Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的現行版本及任何補充接入條件。

requirement_topic.en: Kahramaa Be Solar Distributed Programme — Equipment Approval and Contractor Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: Kahramaa Be Solar分布式太阳能计划——设备审批及承包商要求
requirement_topic.zht: Kahramaa Be Solar分散式太陽能計畫——設備審批及承包商要求

summary.en: Kahramaa's Be Solar programme (launched August 2024) governs distributed grid-connected solar PV installations from 1 kW to 25 MW on Kahramaa's distribution network in Qatar. The programme requires: (a) use of a Kahramaa-approved contractor; (b) a net-billing arrangement requiring a bidirectional smart meter installed by Kahramaa; (c) inverter and equipment compliance with Kahramaa technical specifications, including EP-EPP-P7-S1; (d) Kahramaa application, technical review, and final commissioning inspection before grid connection. Chinese PV inverters supplied to Be Solar projects must comply with Kahramaa's inverter technical specifications as a condition of contractor submission and project approval.
summary.zh: Kahramaa Be Solar计划（2024年8月启动）管理卡塔尔Kahramaa配电网上1 kW至25 MW的分布式并网太阳能光伏装置。该计划要求：（a）使用Kahramaa认可承包商；（b）净电量计量安排，须安装Kahramaa提供的双向智能电表；（c）逆变器和设备符合Kahramaa技术规格，包括EP-EPP-P7-S1；（d）并网前须完成Kahramaa申请、技术审查和最终调试检查。供应至Be Solar项目的中国光伏逆变器须符合Kahramaa逆变器技术规格，作为承包商提交和项目审批的条件。
summary.zht: Kahramaa Be Solar計畫（2024年8月啟動）管理卡達Kahramaa配電網上1 kW至25 MW的分散式併網太陽能光伏裝置。該計畫要求：（a）使用Kahramaa認可承包商；（b）淨電量計量安排，須安裝Kahramaa提供的雙向智慧電表；（c）逆變器和設備符合Kahramaa技術規格，包括EP-EPP-P7-S1；（d）併網前須完成Kahramaa申請、技術審查和最終調試檢查。供應至Be Solar項目的中國光伏逆變器須符合Kahramaa逆變器技術規格，作為承包商提交和項目審批的條件。

standards_or_laws: Kahramaa Be Solar Programme — distributed solar grid-connection rules and application process
Kahramaa Technical Specifications for the Connection of Solar PV Systems to Network — EP-EPP-P7-S1 (applicable to Be Solar project equipment)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent programme. Distributed solar connection in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) distributed PV policies and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) connection rules, which reference China's domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964). These Chinese distributed connection rules are not applicable in Qatar and do not give any presumption of compliance with Kahramaa Be Solar equipment requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的计划。中国分布式太阳能并网受国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策及电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）接入规则管理，引用中国国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964）。上述中国分布式并网规则不适用于卡塔尔，不给予Kahramaa Be Solar设备要求的任何合规推定。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的計畫。中國分散式太陽能併網受國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策及電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）接入規則管理，引用中國國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964）。上述中國分散式併網規則不適用於卡達，不給予Kahramaa Be Solar設備要求的任何合規推定。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Qatar Be Solar projects must be supplied and installed by a Kahramaa-approved contractor and must pass Kahramaa technical review as part of the Be Solar application process. Chinese distributed solar connection approvals do not transfer to Qatar Be Solar requirements. Confirm inverter model eligibility, IEC safety and grid-connection test evidence, and contractor registration status with Kahramaa before committing product to Be Solar projects.
gap.zh: 差距：用于卡塔尔Be Solar项目的中国逆变器须由Kahramaa认可的承包商供货和安装，并须作为Be Solar申请程序的一部分通过Kahramaa技术审查。中国分布式太阳能并网审批不能转移至卡塔尔Be Solar要求。在将产品用于Be Solar项目前，请向Kahramaa确认逆变器型号资格、IEC安全和并网测试证据及承包商注册状态。
gap.zht: 差距：用於卡達Be Solar項目的中國逆變器須由Kahramaa認可的承包商供貨和安裝，並須作為Be Solar申請程序的一部分通過Kahramaa技術審查。中國分散式太陽能併網審批不能轉移至卡達Be Solar要求。在將產品用於Be Solar項目前，請向Kahramaa確認逆變器型號資格、IEC安全和併網測試證據及承包商登記狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all distributed solar grid-connection projects under the Be Solar programme; Kahramaa equipment technical review is a non-negotiable project gate
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are granted under China NEA policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Qatar

source.publisher: Kahramaa (Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kahramaa Be Solar is a separate project approval gate from any Chinese domestic distributed solar approval. Confirm inverter model eligibility and IEC compliance evidence with the Kahramaa-approved contractor and Kahramaa project review team before project submission. The Be Solar programme was launched in August 2024 — verify current application requirements and equipment eligibility criteria directly at km.qa.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] Kahramaa Be Solar是独立于任何中国国内分布式太阳能审批的项目审批门槛。在项目提交前，请与Kahramaa认可承包商及Kahramaa项目审查团队确认逆变器型号资格和IEC合规证据。Be Solar计划于2024年8月启动——请直接在km.qa核实当前申请要求和设备资格标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] Kahramaa Be Solar是獨立於任何中國國內分散式太陽能審批的項目審批門檻。在項目提交前，請與Kahramaa認可承包商及Kahramaa項目審查團隊確認逆變器型號資格和IEC合規證據。Be Solar計畫於2024年8月啟動——請直接在km.qa核實當前申請要求和設備資格標準。
